gravity_link: Essential for proprioception, which provides the gravity reference frame for posture control.
spine_curvature_link: Loss of function mutations cause congenital scoliosis; asymmetric expression in paraspinal muscles in AIS. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1602812)
justification: Direct link between gravity sensing (proprioception) and spinal alignment.

gravity_link: Regulates migration of muscle precursors and formation of dorsal horn neurons involved in proprioception/gravity sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Top GWAS hit for Adolescent Idiopathic Scoliosis (AIS). (DOI: 10.1038/ng.814)
justification: Major genetic driver of AIS with clear mechanistic link to postural tone.

gravity_link: Linked to PIEZO1-Primary Cilia axis; essential for sensing flow/load.
spine_curvature_link: Deletion causes scoliosis; PIEZO1-cilia axis mediates stress response in AIS. (PMID: 41194970)
justification: Direct link via PIEZO1-cilia axis.

gravity_link: Microfibrils provide long-range elasticity and sequester TGF-beta, responding to tissue stretch.
spine_curvature_link: Marfan syndrome patients have high prevalence of scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1000501)
justification: Major structural determinant of spine elasticity.

gravity_link: Senses mechanical overload; expression upregulates in compressed regions.
spine_curvature_link: Scoliotic growth plates show convex-concave asymmetry in PIEZO1 expression; mediates ferroptosis in vertebral dysplasia. (PMC12533149)
justification: Direct mechanistic link to growth plate asymmetry in scoliosis.

gravity_link: Nuclear translocation is directly regulated by mechanical stiffness and gravity loading forces.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates osteoblast differentiation and vertebral growth; deletion leads to skeletal defects.
justification: Central hub of cellular mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Ciliary function is critical for detecting fluid flow and potentially gravity vectors (statocysts analogy).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations found in familial AIS; causes ciliary defects and spinal curvature in zebrafish. (DOI: 10.1172/JCI77262)
justification: Direct genetic cause of scoliosis linked to ciliary geometry.

gravity_link: Integrins are the primary cellular gravity/load sensors via focal adhesions.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in cartilage leads to scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1073/pnas.1513252112)
justification: Primary gravity sensor at cell-ECM interface.

gravity_link: Required for ciliary formation and flow sensing (gravity proxy).
spine_curvature_link: Conditional knockout leads to scoliosis in zebrafish. (PMID: 9441191)
justification: Essential for ciliary structure and gravity sensing.

gravity_link: Major load-bearing proteoglycan in IVD/cartilage; resists gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Loss leads to disc degeneration and height loss. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.1380020102 implied)
justification: Primary structural resistor of gravity load.

gravity_link: Paralog of YAP, acts as a mechanosensor of matrix stiffness and gravity-derived stress.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for skeletal development; deficiency causes osteopenia and spinal deformities.
justification: Key partner of YAP in mechanosensing.

gravity_link: GPR126 is a mechanosensitive GPCR; essential for intervertebral disc maintenance under mechanical load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations associated with AIS; required for spinal alignment in zebrafish. (DOI: 10.1016/j.neuron.2014.05.022)
justification: Mechanosensitive receptor directly linked to spine integrity.

gravity_link: Actin cytoskeleton crosslinker, responds to mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocarpotarsal Synostosis Syndrome with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1319)
justification: Structural integrator of stress and segmentation.

gravity_link: Regulates somite boundary formation (the 'clock'), establishing structural units.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis (severe spinal malformation). (DOI: 10.1086/302826)
justification: Critical for vertebral segmentation integrity.

gravity_link: Ciliary function detects fluid flow (gravity proxy).
spine_curvature_link: Novel mutations associated with AIS; causes severe scoliosis in zebrafish via CSF flow defects. (PMID: 33156271)
justification: Strong genetic link involving the CSF flow pathway.

gravity_link: Regulates chondrogenesis under load; maintains IVD integrity against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Gene therapy target for IVD degeneration. (PMC4123440)
justification: Master regulator of gravity-resisting tissue.

gravity_link: Core PCP component aligning tissues against stress lines.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations predispose to Congenital Vertebral Malformations (CVM) and scoliosis. (TMC 2227)
justification: PCP disruption directly links to vertebral defects.

gravity_link: Regulates somitogenesis timing; establishes axial pattern.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations linked to congenital scoliosis and segmentation defects. (Genes & Dev)
justification: Critical for vertebral segmentation timing.

gravity_link: Planar Cell Polarity (PCP) aligns cells against tissue stress lines (gravity).
spine_curvature_link: Rare variants associated with AIS; essential for vertebral shape. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.1002843)
justification: PCP pathway is fundamental to body axis linearity.

gravity_link: Regulates convergent extension movements, resisting gravity-induced spreading.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause scoliosis in zebrafish and are found in AIS patients. (DOI: 10.1038/ncomms1352)
justification: Core PCP component linked to spinal curvature.

gravity_link: Major structural component resisting compressive gravity loads in spine.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause spondyloepiphyseal dysplasia and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.1380020102)
justification: Primary gravity-resisting molecule in the spine.

gravity_link: Regulates somite segmentation clock; timing errors lead to hemivertebrae.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Congenital Scoliosis (CS). (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1405829)
justification: Fundamental to vertebral segmentation symmetry.

gravity_link: Central mediator of integrin mechanotransduction and gravity response.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for osteoblast response to load; deletion affects bone formation.
justification: Key signal transducer for gravity sensing.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive ion channel in cilia (flow/bending).
spine_curvature_link: Partner of PKD1L1; essential for left-right asymmetry and spine straightness in zebrafish.
justification: Ciliary mechanosensor linked to asymmetry.

gravity_link: Notch signaling component for segmentation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0502-385)
justification: Notch ligand essential for somite boundaries.

gravity_link: Cell-cell adhesion, transmits tension across tissues.
spine_curvature_link: Asymmetric expression implicated in curvature.
justification: Transmits mechanical information between cells.

gravity_link: Regulates osteogenesis and limb development under load.
spine_curvature_link: Novel variants associated with Congenital Scoliosis; signaling reduced in patients. (PMID: 34440300)
justification: Key growth factor receptor linked to congenital spinal defects.

gravity_link: Establishes structural units (somites) resisting gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis; defects lead to late-onset scoliosis due to muscle-spine mismatch. (PMID: 34440615)
justification: Proven segmentation defect link to spinal malformation.

gravity_link: Regulates bone turnover and chondrocyte differentiation under load.
spine_curvature_link: Jansen Metaphyseal Chondrodysplasia causes scoliosis. (NBK616087)
justification: Key regulator of bone response to load.

gravity_link: PCP component; localization affected by mutations.
spine_curvature_link: Linked to Spina Bifida and craniorachischisis. (CDC 22582)
justification: PCP polarity defect links to neural tube/spine.

gravity_link: Cytoskeleton remodels under microgravity (PNAS 2000).
spine_curvature_link: Essential for cell stiffness and mechanosensitivity.
justification: Fundamental gravity-responsive cytoskeletal element.

gravity_link: Microtubule self-organization is gravity-dependent (PNAS 2000).
spine_curvature_link: Structural integrity against compression.
justification: Gravity-dependent self-assembly demonstrated in vitro.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive ion channel activated by osmotic and mechanical stress (gravity load).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause metatropic dysplasia and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.667)
justification: Direct mechanosensor in chondrocytes.

gravity_link: PCP pathway component aligning tissues against stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause neural tube defects; PCP is key for spine straightening.
justification: PCP determinant of tissue polarity.

gravity_link: Nucleates collagen fibril assembly, determining fiber diameter and mechanical strength.
spine_curvature_link: Stickler syndrome (Type II) causes scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1002/ajmg.1320570103)
justification: Controls collagen fibril mechanics.

gravity_link: Essential for muscle cell adhesion to ECM, resisting gravity load.
spine_curvature_link: Early-onset LAMA2-related dystrophy causes severe, progressive scoliosis. (PMC7545609)
justification: Critical for muscle-matrix coupling; loss leads to severe curvature.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive expression in endothelial cells (AHA).
spine_curvature_link: Regulates bone formation/resorption balance.
justification: Shear stress modulates expression.

gravity_link: Non-canonical Wnt signaling in mechanotransduction (Frontiers).
spine_curvature_link: Regulates tissue polarity and orientation.
justification: Mechanotransduction signaling mediator.

gravity_link: Cartilage Oligomeric Matrix Protein; organizes collagen to resist load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Pseudoachondroplasia with associated spinal curvature.
justification: Critical for matrix integrity under load.

gravity_link: Detects cerebrospinal fluid flow in central canal; flow dynamics are gravity-influenced.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause scoliosis in zebrafish and humans. (DOI: 10.1038/s41467-018-06283-3)
justification: Links CSF flow sensing to spine straightness.

gravity_link: Notochord (hydrostatic skeleton) secretion; provides initial gravity resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Modulation affects vertebral shape and disc formation. VACTERL syndrome.
justification: Morphogen establishing the gravity axis.

gravity_link: Master osteogenic factor; expression is upregulated by mechanical load (gravity).
spine_curvature_link: Cleidocranial dysplasia involves spinal abnormalities; essential for vertebral ossification.
justification: Master regulator of bone response to load.

gravity_link: Regulates somite boundary formation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis type 3 with severe vertebral defects. (OMIM: 609813)
justification: Notch modulator essential for vertebral segmentation.

gravity_link: Kinesin motor for ciliary transport; cilia are potential gravity sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Associated with AIS susceptibility. (DOI: 10.1093/hmg/ddq172)
justification: Ciliary motor protein linked to scoliosis.

gravity_link: Caveolae flatten under mechanical tension; reduced in microgravity.
spine_curvature_link: Required for notochord mechanical integrity; loss in zebrafish leads to kinking (scoliosis-like).
justification: Membrane tension sensor linked to notochord mechanics.

gravity_link: Perlecan; mechanosensor in lacuno-canalicular system of bone.
spine_curvature_link: Deficiency leads to Schwartz-Jampel syndrome with skeletal abnormalities (kyphoscoliosis).
justification: Key mechanosensory ECM component.

gravity_link: Forms filamentous networks in cartilage; contributes to stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Linked to idiopathic scoliosis susceptibility in some populations. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ygeno.2007.03.010)
justification: Structural component of cartilage matrix.

gravity_link: Wnt signaling responds to mechanical load (osteocyte mechanotransduction).
spine_curvature_link: Crucial for bone mass regulation and vertebral formation.
justification: Key signaling pathway in bone mechanobiology.

gravity_link: BMP antagonist; balances proliferation/differentiation in growth plate under load.
spine_curvature_link: Variants linked to bone density and potentially structural defects.
justification: Regulates growth plate sensitivity.

gravity_link: Cytoskeletal remodeling in microgravity; essential for cell stiffness. (Wuest et al., 2025, doi:10.3389/frspt.2025.1677728)
spine_curvature_link: General link to mesenchymal cell mechanics; upregulation in compressed discs.
justification: Intermediate filament responsive to gravity loading.

gravity_link: Drives muscle gene expression changes in microgravity. (PMC5515518)
spine_curvature_link: Protects against IVD degeneration; decline linked to aging spine.
justification: Metabolic regulator of muscle response to unloading.

gravity_link: Secreted glycoprotein; modulates BMP signaling in osteogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: Overexpression implicated in high bone mass and potential structural anomalies.
justification: Emerging candidate in bone morphogenesis.

gravity_link: Hox genes specify vertebral identity along the A-P axis (gravity axis).
spine_curvature_link: Disruption leads to vertebral patterning defects.
justification: Positional identity gene.

gravity_link: Upregulated in microgravity, arresting osteoblast growth. (Blaber et al., 2013, PMC3630201)
spine_curvature_link: Involved in intervertebral disc senescence.
justification: Key marker of microgravity-induced cell cycle arrest.

gravity_link: Nuclear lamina scales with tissue stiffness; central mechanotransducer (Swift et al., 2013).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause LMNA-CMD and EDMD2/3 with severe scoliosis. (PMC4105307)
justification: Direct link between nuclear mechanotransduction and spinal stability.

gravity_link: Required for sclerotome differentiation and vertebral body formation (gravity resisting units).
spine_curvature_link: Undulated mouse mutants show severe vertebral defects and scoliosis. (PMID: 7875377)
justification: Essential for vertebral structural integrity.

gravity_link: Inhibits chondrocyte maturation; modulates stress response in cartilage.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylo-megaepiphyseal-metaphyseal dysplasia (SMMD) with scoliosis. (PMC7860120)
justification: Regulates cartilage growth under load.

gravity_link: Interface between muscle and ECM; critical for force transmission.
spine_curvature_link: Ullrich CMD and Bethlem Myopathy feature prominent scoliosis. (PMC8283577)
justification: Key for muscle-matrix mechanical coupling.

gravity_link: LIM domains act as mechanosensors; mutations cause Reducing Body Myopathy.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations lead to rigid spine syndrome and severe scoliosis. (PMC11978423)
justification: Muscle mechanosensor linked to spinal rigidity.

gravity_link: BMP family member regulating vertebral segmentation and fusion.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Klippel-Feil syndrome (fused vertebrae/scoliosis). (MedlinePlus)
justification: Direct cause of vertebral fusion defects.

gravity_link: Mediator of Wnt/PCP signaling; establishes tissue polarity against stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Robinow Syndrome with hemivertebrae and scoliosis. (PMC4385193)
justification: PCP mediator linked to segmentation defects.

gravity_link: Wnt co-receptor regulating bone mass in response to load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations alter anabolic response to loading; osteoporosis-pseudoglioma syndrome. (Frontiers)
justification: Key regulator of bone mechanoadaptation.

gravity_link: Connects nucleus to cytoskeleton; essential for force transmission.
spine_curvature_link: Deficiency causes ataxia and arthrogryposis with spinal deformities. (GeneReviews)
justification: LINC complex component essential for cellular mechanics.

gravity_link: Regulates calcium release for muscle contraction (postural tone).
spine_curvature_link: Central Core Disease is strongly associated with congenital scoliosis. (PM&R)
justification: Essential for muscle tone maintenance.

gravity_link: Regulates sclerotome development and vertebral formation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Klippel-Feil syndrome. (KEGG)
justification: Transcription factor for vertebral somites.

gravity_link: Involved in vertebral development and segmentation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Klippel-Feil syndrome and skeletal defects. (CHOP)
justification: Linked to vertebral fusion.

gravity_link: PCP component aligning cells against stress lines.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause progressive myoclonus epilepsy; PCP defects link to spine.
justification: PCP pathway member.

gravity_link: Functional unloading alters m6A RNA methylation in muscle, regulating atrophy (Sun et al., 2023).
spine_curvature_link: ROS-METTL3-ESR1 axis drives paraspinal muscle asymmetry in AIS (Shao et al., 2025).
justification: Key epigenetic regulator linking oxidative stress to muscle asymmetry.

gravity_link: Estrogen deficiency accelerates bone loss in space; key regulator of mechanical loading response.
spine_curvature_link: Suppressed by METTL3 in AIS paraspinal muscles; polymorphisms linked to curve severity.
justification: Mechanosensitive receptor linking hormonal status to spinal stability.

gravity_link: Primary driver of IVD ECM degradation under simulated microgravity (Chen et al., 2025).
spine_curvature_link: ECM degradation leads to disc wedging and curvature progression.
justification: Direct enzymatic driver of microgravity-induced disc degeneration.

gravity_link: Upregulated in IVD cells under microgravity; degrades proteoglycans (Chen et al., 2025).
spine_curvature_link: Polymorphisms associated with disc degeneration and scoliosis susceptibility.
justification: Key protease in load-dependent disc remodeling.

gravity_link: Drives marrow adipogenesis at expense of osteogenesis in microgravity (Pandit et al., 2025).
spine_curvature_link: Paraspinal muscle fatty infiltration is a hallmark of progressive scoliosis.
justification: Regulates the muscle-to-fat switch observed in unloading and scoliosis.

gravity_link: Crosslinks collagen/elastin; activity is modulated by mechanical load.
spine_curvature_link: Inhibition leads to lathyrism (spinal deformities); essential for spine stability.
justification: Critical enzyme for establishing tissue stiffness against gravity.

gravity_link: Structural collagen essential for cartilage stiffness and load resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Stickler syndrome and Otospondylomegaepiphyseal dysplasia with scoliosis.
justification: Structural collagen linking hearing loss to spinal defects.

gravity_link: Ciliary flow sensing component (fluid flow as gravity proxy).
spine_curvature_link: Key for Left-Right asymmetry; mutations cause cystic kidney disease and skeletal defects.
justification: Essential for ciliary mechanosensation and body axis symmetry.

gravity_link: Mechanosensor in cilia/bone (polycystin complex with PKD2).
spine_curvature_link: ADPKD patients have higher prevalence of spinal abnormalities.
justification: Mechanotransduction partner of PKD2 in ciliary sensing.

gravity_link: Mitochondrial ROS is a major driver of spaceflight induced cellular damage (Shao et al., 2025).
spine_curvature_link: Oxidative stress in paraspinal muscles contributes to asymmetry and AIS progression.
justification: Mitochondrial antioxidant defending against unloading-induced ROS.

gravity_link: Inhibition leads to muscle growth; key target for preventing atrophy in microgravity. (Smith et al., 2020)
spine_curvature_link: Muscle asymmetry and weakness contribute to curve progression in AIS.
justification: Strong muscle link; potential therapeutic target for unloading.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive osteocyte-secreted inhibitor of Wnt; upregulated in unloading (bone loss). (Spatz et al., 2015)
spine_curvature_link: Regulates vertebral bone density; inhibition increases bone mass.
justification: Direct mechanosensor in bone; key for microgravity bone loss.

gravity_link: Notch signaling is sensitive to fluid shear stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Alagille syndrome (butterfly vertebrae) and Hajdu-Cheney syndrome (severe osteoporosis/scoliosis). (Isidor et al., 2011)
justification: Linked to vertebral segmentation and bone mass.

gravity_link: Regulates timing of somitogenesis (segmentation clock).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis and vertebral segmentation defects. (McInerney-Leo et al., 2015)
justification: Essential for vertebral segmentation pattern.

gravity_link: Mechanotransduction regulates IHH in chondrocytes. (Wu et al., 2001)
spine_curvature_link: Essential for vertebral body growth and ossification; mutations cause brachydactyly A1.
justification: Key regulator of growth plate ossification under load.

gravity_link: Hemichannels open in response to mechanical stress; essential for osteocyte network. (Jamsheer et al., 2010)
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Oculodentodigital Dysplasia with spinal anomalies.
justification: Essential for osteocyte mechanotransduction network.

gravity_link: Recruited to stress fibers under tension; gravity sensing at focal adhesions. (Hoffman et al., 2012)
spine_curvature_link: Regulates cell mechanics; potential link via actin remodeling.
justification: Mechanosensitive protein at focal adhesions.

gravity_link: Bardet-Biedl Syndrome protein; cilia are gravity/flow sensors.
spine_curvature_link: BBS patients have high prevalence of scoliosis. (Alvarez-Satta et al., 2017)
justification: Ciliary component linked to syndromic scoliosis.

gravity_link: Controls ciliary gating and signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Meckel-Gruber/Joubert syndromes; rpgrip1l mutant zebrafish develop scoliosis (eLife 2024).
justification: Strong recent evidence linking ciliary defect to scoliosis.

gravity_link: Master regulator of motile cilia (flow sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Upregulated in rpgrip1l scoliosis models; essential for L-R asymmetry. (eLife 2024)
justification: Master regulator of motile cilia.

gravity_link: Linked to Weiss-Kruszka Syndrome; potential neural crest hyper-proliferation.
spine_curvature_link: Patients with ZNF462 variants frequently present with scoliosis. (Weiss et al., 2017)
justification: Syndromic link to scoliosis via neural crest.

gravity_link: Mechanically induced in osteocytes and disc cells (COX2).
spine_curvature_link: Elevated in degenerative disc disease and scoliosis. (PMC11470263)
justification: Inflammatory mediator in mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Actin crosslinker that acts as a mechanosensor, unfolding under tension to regulate integrin binding.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Otopalatodigital spectrum disorders and Ehlers-Danlos-like syndromes with frequent scoliosis. (PMC12493046)
justification: Direct mechanosensor linking cytoskeletal tension to ECM signaling; strong genetic link.

gravity_link: Downstream effector of TGF-beta; TGF-beta release is mechanically regulated by ECM stretch (FBN1).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Loeys-Dietz syndrome, where scoliosis is a major feature. (Marfan Trust)
justification: Key effector of the mechanically-regulated TGF-beta pathway; syndromic scoliosis link.

gravity_link: Connects cytoskeleton to ECM (costamere), protecting muscle from contraction-induced mechanical damage and gravity load.
spine_curvature_link: Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy patients have very high prevalence of severe, progressive scoliosis. (SciELO)
justification: Essential for maintenance of muscle tone against gravity; loss leads to collapse.

gravity_link: Essential for motile cilia function (dynein assembly), which are flow/gravity sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Novel rare variation associated with AIS; downregulation found in AIS patients; causes curvature in zebrafish. (Spine J 2025, PMID: 39662682)
justification: Strong recent evidence (2025) linking motile cilia dysfunction to AIS.

gravity_link: Kinesin motor in Hedgehog pathway; cilia are flow/gravity sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations in KIF7 implicated in Idiopathic Scoliosis in humans and axial curvatures in zebrafish. (ResearchGate)
justification: Ciliary motor protein with direct genetic implication in scoliosis.

gravity_link: Regulates EMT and osteoblast differentiation under mechanical constraints.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Saethre-Chotzen syndrome, which includes spinal abnormalities and scoliosis. (MedlinePlus)
justification: Developmental regulator linked to syndromic spinal defects.

gravity_link: Highly mechanosensitive matricellular protein; upregulated by load in bone and PDL.
spine_curvature_link: Involved in regulating vertebral bone mass; linked to spinal degenerative diseases. (Frontiers)
justification: Mechanosensitive ECM component regulating bone density.

gravity_link: Neurofibromin regulates Ras/MAPK; loss alters cytoskeletal contractility and mechanosensitivity.
spine_curvature_link: Dystrophic scoliosis is a hallmark of Neurofibromatosis Type 1. (DOI: 10.5435/JAAOS-D-19-00105)
justification: Direct causative link to dystrophic scoliosis and mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Major load-bearing collagen in bone; expression regulated by gravity/loading.
spine_curvature_link: Osteogenesis Imperfecta (Type I/III/IV) features severe progressive scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.spam.2014.11.002)
justification: Primary structural failure against gravity in OI.

gravity_link: Motile cilia sense/generate flow; essential for distinguishing gravity vector vs fluid shear.
spine_curvature_link: Primary Ciliary Dyskinesia patients often have scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1183/09031936.00046808)
justification: Ciliary motility defect linked to laterality and spine.

gravity_link: Essential for ciliary motility and fluid flow sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause PCD; zebrafish kurnegal mutants have curly tails (scoliosis). (DOI: 10.1091/mbc.E13-05-0235)
justification: Strong zebrafish evidence linking ciliary motility to curvature.

gravity_link: Microtubule-binding protein in axoneme; required for ciliary motility.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause spine curvature in zebrafish and PCD in humans. (DOI: 10.1073/pnas.1002517107)
justification: Ciliary motility protein linked to axis straightening.

gravity_link: Crosslinks collagen telopeptides, critical for bone stiffness and load resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Bruck syndrome (osteoporosis + congenital contractures) includes scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.20573)
justification: Enzyme defining collagen mechanical properties.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive at adherens junctions; nuclear translocation modulated by strain.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in osteoblasts leads to vertebral deformities. (DOI: 10.1002/jbmr.264)
justification: Key Wnt effector and mechanotransducer.

gravity_link: Antagonizes BMP to fine-tune bone formation under load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause symphalangism and vertebral fusions (Klippel-Feil like). (DOI: 10.1038/ng0399-255)
justification: Regulator of vertebral segmentation and fusion.

gravity_link: Central to PI3K/Akt pathway, activated by integrins/mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Proteus syndrome (AKT1 mutation) causes distorting overgrowth and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1104017)
justification: Major growth regulator causing asymmetry when mutated.

gravity_link: Co-SMAD for TGF-beta/BMP, pathways regulated by mechanical strain.
spine_curvature_link: Myhre syndrome causes short stature, stiff joints, and spinal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.985)
justification: TGF-beta pathway component linked to syndromic spine defects.

gravity_link: Regulates stress fibers and actomyosin contractility, the primary cellular response to gravity.
spine_curvature_link: RhoA pathway modulation rescues spinal defects in some models; essential for neural crest. (PMID: 21474759)
justification: Master regulator of cytoskeletal tension.

gravity_link: Generates non-muscle cortical tension, essential for cell shape in gravity.
spine_curvature_link: MYH9-related disorders can include skeletal defects; key for notochord mechanics. (GeneReviews)
justification: Generates cellular tension countering deformation.

gravity_link: Modulates collagen fibril diameter and bone mass response to unloading.
spine_curvature_link: Deficient mice develop osteoporosis and potential spinal deformities. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1098-82)
justification: ECM regulator of bone quality and mechanics.

gravity_link: Crosslinker between membrane and actin; stabilizes cell cortex against deformation.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for notochord morphogenesis and spine alignment in zebrafish. (PMID: 21215259)
justification: Membrane-cytoskeleton linker.

gravity_link: Links ion channels to actin cytoskeleton; scaffolding for mechanocomplexes.
spine_curvature_link: Interacts with PCP proteins; loss affects bone quality and potentially alignment.
justification: Scaffold protein linking signaling to structure.

gravity_link: Ciliary transition zone protein essential for sensing flow/gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Astrogliosis in ciliary mutants drives scoliosis via neuroinflammation (eLife 2024).
justification: Novel astrogliosis mechanism linking ciliary defects to spine.

gravity_link: TGF-beta signaling is mechanically regulated by ECM stretch.
spine_curvature_link: Deletion in collagen-expressing cells leads to IVD defects and spinal deformity (Loeys-Dietz).
justification: Key signaling receptor for load-dependent tissue maintenance.

gravity_link: Modulates TGF-beta bioavailability and microfibril assembly under load.
spine_curvature_link: Aberrant interaction with LTBP4 associated with AIS; Geleophysic dysplasia.
justification: Regulates microfibril tension and signaling in AIS.

gravity_link: Binds TGF-beta to ECM, releasing it upon mechanical strain.
spine_curvature_link: Partner of ADAMTSL2 in AIS pathogenesis.
justification: Mechanosensitive TGF-beta anchor linked to AIS.

gravity_link: Constitutive activation reduces nuclear elasticity and impairs mechanotransduction.
spine_curvature_link: PROS/CLOVES syndromes feature scoliosis; vascular malformations.
justification: Nuclear mechanics and mechanotransduction failure.

gravity_link: Regulates collagen fibril diameter and tissue tensile strength.
spine_curvature_link: Classical Ehlers-Danlos syndrome features scoliosis.
justification: Structural determinant of tissue stiffness.

gravity_link: Tenascin-X determines tissue elasticity and stability against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Deficiency causes Ehlers-Danlos syndrome with spinal laxity.
justification: Essential for ECM elastic properties.

gravity_link: Cathepsin K mediates IVD matrix remodeling under load.
spine_curvature_link: Upregulated in degenerative disc disease; constitutive in IVD.
justification: Key enzyme for load-driven disc remodeling.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive ion channel contributing to light touch and sensory feedback.
spine_curvature_link: Potential role in proprioceptive feedback loops.
justification: Mechanosensory channel distinct from Piezo.

gravity_link: Upregulated in degenerative IVD cells; response to stress.
spine_curvature_link: Marks senescence and apoptosis in scoliotic discs.
justification: Marker of mechanical stress-induced senescence.

gravity_link: Upregulated in degenerative discs; cell cycle arrest.
spine_curvature_link: Linked to IVD degeneration and potential asymmetry.
justification: Senescence marker in loaded tissues.

gravity_link: Unfolds under cytoskeletal tension (molecular spring), recruiting actin regulators.
spine_curvature_link: Polymorphisms in focal adhesion genes are linked to AIS susceptibility. (DOI: 10.1038/s41598-019-49200-y)
justification: Strong mechanotransduction link via focal adhesion tension.

gravity_link: Primary force transmission link between integrins and actin; rod domain unfolds under tension.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in osteoblasts leads to osteopenia and spinal deformities. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.1006886)
justification: Fundamental force transmission molecule.

gravity_link: Regulates ciliogenesis and actin assembly; essential for sensing fluid flow.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause severe vertebral segmentation defects and rib fusions (CPLANE). (DOI: 10.1038/ng.3558)
justification: Strong PCP/Cilia link to segmentation.

gravity_link: Controls apical actin enrichment and cilia formation; required for directional fluid flow sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Knockout mice display neural tube defects and disorganized vertebral bodies. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.1002931)
justification: Essential PCP effector for ciliogenesis.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive channel activated by membrane stretch and gravity-induced hydrostatic pressure.
spine_curvature_link: Gain-of-function mutations alter cellular mechanosensing; expressed in bone/muscle.
justification: Mechanosensitive ion channel.

gravity_link: Regulates actomyosin crossbridges and muscle tone; essential for postural maintenance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Distal Arthrogryposis Type 1 with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2009.11.014)
justification: Direct regulator of muscle tone and posture.

gravity_link: Regulates fibroblast response to mechanical stiffness; essential for limb/spine morphogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Agnathia-Otocephaly; AIS GWAS hits near PRRX1 locus. (DOI: 10.1038/s41467-018-06619-7)
justification: GWAS link and developmental regulator.

gravity_link: FACIT collagen bridging fibrils; provides shear resistance to cartilage under load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Stickler Syndrome and Multiple Epiphyseal Dysplasia with spinal flattening. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.1380020110)
justification: Structural integrity of cartilage matrix.

gravity_link: Specifies dorsal identity and regulates collagen expression.
spine_curvature_link: Nail-Patella Syndrome causes iliac horns and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0598-7)
justification: Dorso-ventral patterning and collagen regulation.

gravity_link: Crosslinks actin and microtubules (spectraplakin); essential for cytoskeletal tensegrity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause HSAN Type VI with severe kyphoscoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2010.11.010)
justification: Strong neural/cytoskeletal tensegrity link.

gravity_link: Regulates muscle mass and bone density; loss mimics 'failure to thrive' (unloading).
spine_curvature_link: Prader-Willi/Schaaf-Yang Syndrome features high prevalence of scoliosis (80%). (DOI: 10.1136/jmedgenet-2013-102023)
justification: Syndromic link to muscle hypotonia and spine.

gravity_link: PI3K pathway is activated by mechanical stress; regulates cell size and growth.
spine_curvature_link: SHORT syndrome includes spinal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2013.06.011)
justification: Growth pathway linked to mechanotransduction.
